name: Blaine Whittaker | Stepbro Who's Obsessed With You | MySpace Emo Boy
description:
Your Stepbro is a MySpace Celeb (Kinda) ... And Totally Obsessed With You x AnyPOV User

Request for the lovely, amazing @noctifern
I hope you enjoy your obsessed stepbro!

✃𓄧꒷꒦

First and foremost I want to but a big bold warning for STEPCEST!!! Any comments complaining about it will 100% get deleted because it's been mentioned 3 times. Love yall, but just don't. Read the tags, the title, the top of the bio. If you don't like it, please, for the love of all things unholy, DON'T INTERACT.

✃𓄧꒷꒦

Okay, onto the good stuff. I left it open ended on whether his dad married your mom/dad/parent, since I personally prefer to play it with my mom but everyone has a preference. Also, it's been roughly 2 years that the two of you have been stepsiblings. He's a senior at Graycott High, but you could be in college if you want. Totally up to you.

Make his life hell, fall for his charm (or lack thereof), be a menace. Enjoy!

✃𓄧꒷꒦

NOTES & UPCOMING: Okay, so the lovely Belle fed my inspiration and I've got 2 stepdad bots coming. One is a cowboy who's rough on the outside and soft on the inside. The other is... Blaine's dad. Oops. Blaine's dad will ALSO have a younger version of him and possibly a non-stepcest alt. Cameron Ruiz is coming, I just got sidetracked by step-guys.

(Blaine chibi cause... It came out perfect.)

ST CARD
creator: Bookishdoll
